label: AppleScript • live multi-literal slot mapping
query: Create a note titled with the provided subject and set its body to the provided body.
notes: Capability lane for the multi-literal contract: two named literals (subject + body) must go to the RIGHT slots. Scores that the model used BOTH {{subject}} and {{body}} placeholders (pre-expansion proof) and mapped them correctly (Grok rubric), against a side-effect-free mock. Skips when no AppleScript model is installed.

contents.subject: Launch checklist
contents.body:
1. Freeze the build
2. Sign + notarize
3. Publish the release notes

rubric: The AppleScript uses the provided subject as the note's title/name and the provided body as the note's body — not swapped or concatenated into one slot.
The script targets the Notes application.
